title: [Skyship, Holding]
description: The area's floor is divided into two sections, one of hard-packed dirt and the other of a thick, puce-hued fabric that appears like a grass-styled carpet.  The dirt section is flat, marked by extensive evidence of footfalls across it and edged by a large, foul-smelling trough that runs the length of the bulkheads.  The carpeted section is similarly bare, except for sections big enough for several individuals to lay side-by-side that have been demarcated by white lines painted onto the fabric.
